user.title: Cellcom Energy — Connect Account
user.description:
## Option A — Not logged in yet

1. Open: [cellcom.co.il/Authentication/otp-login-page/](https://cellcom.co.il/Authentication/otp-login-page/)
2. Press **F12 → Console** and paste:
```
{snippet}
```
3. You will see: *Interceptor active (XHR+fetch)*
4. **Log in normally** — after login a dialog appears with your tokens. Copy it and paste below.

---

## Option B — Already logged in on Cellcom

1. On any Cellcom page press **F12 → Console** and paste:
```
{extract_snippet}
```
2. A dialog will appear with your tokens. Copy it and paste below.

data_description.tokens_json: The JSON text from the dialog (starts with {"accessToken":...})

error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach Cellcom servers. Check your internet connection.
error.invalid_tokens_json: The pasted text is not valid. Make sure you copied the complete text from the dialog (it should start with {"accessToken":...).
error.no_energy_account: No Cellcom Energy (electricity) account was found. Make sure you have an active electricity contract with Cellcom.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. See the HA log for details.

abort.already_configured: This Cellcom Energy account is already configured.
